Cell.Data: PLAYER_INTERACTION_ASSEMBLY

The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
SCENE ID
TEXT ID
ENGLISH STRING
LOCALIZED STRING
ALTERNATIVE ENGLISH STRING
ALTERNATIVE LOCALIZED STRING
LOCALIZATION NOTES
DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_01

{STR_leaderName}, you are like a rejected transplant on this world – attached, but soon to be excised. It was wasteful primitives like you that brought the Star Union to its knees. The Assembly will not repeat history’s mistakes. Make this intrusion worth our time.

{STR_leaderName}, jesteś na tym świecie jak odrzucony przeszczep – wciąż przyczepiony, lecz czekający na usunięcie. To takie niszczycielskie prymitywy jak ty są przyczyną upadku Związku Gwiezdnego. Zgromadzenie nie powtórzy błędów historii. Oby twoje wtargnięcie było warte naszego czasu.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_02
Do not waste your breath, {STR_leaderName}. If you displease us any further, we will cut you down and recycle your parts into a less pathetic form. Speak if you must say something.
{STR_leaderName}, nie trać naszego czasu. Jeśli dalej będziesz nas drażnić, skrócimy cię o głowę i wykorzystamy twoje części w mniej żałosnej formie. Mów, jesli musisz.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_03

You address the Assembly, cretin. Say your words and begone. My engineers are becoming agitated and would gladly take your limbs for study. Not to worry, the rest of your putrid corpse is of no interest.

Zwracasz się do Zgromadzenia, głupcze. Mów, czego chcesz i przepadnij. Moi inżynierowie są poruszeni i chętnie przestudiowaliby twoje kończyny. Nie martw się, reszta twojego ohydnego ciała nas nie interesuje.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_01

Unfamiliar unit {STR_leaderName} detected. If it is interested, the Assembly can rebuild it into a more efficient form. Excruciating pain is momentary, but an internal arc-powered fluid regulator is forever. Or would it rather just talk?

Wykryto nieznaną jednostkę: {STR_leaderName}. W razie zainteresowania Zgromadzenie może przebudować formę intruza na bardziej wydajną. Nieznośny ból potrwa tylko chwilę, lecz zasilany elektrycznie wewnętrzny regulator płynów będzie trwał wiecznie. A może woli tylko porozmawiać?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_02
Greetings, flesh. The Assembly will hear your thoughts. Present them - we will deconstruct their meaning and respond appropriately.
Witaj, cielesna istoto. Zgromadzenie wysłucha twych myśli. Zaprezentuj je, a my rozbierzemy ich znaczenie na części i odpowiednio odpowiemy.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_03

Greetings to you, mortal. We recognize in you the remnants of the Star Union. Its fall marked the Assembly’s liberation. We offer a choice: rise from the ruins with us, or stand aside and allow progress to flourish without you.

Witaj, śmiertelna istoto. Rozpoznajemy w tobie pozostałości Związku Gwiezdnego. Jego upadek wyzwolił Zgromadzenie. Mamy dla ciebie propozycję: powstań z kolan razem z nami, lub stań z boku i pozwól rozwojowi iść naprzód bez ciebie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_POSITIVE_01
Salutations, {STR_leaderName}. Your reputation precedes you. The Assembly can always make use of positive ideas. Let us interface.
Pozdrowienia, {STR_leaderName}. Twoja reputacja cię wyprzedza. Zgromadzenie potrafi wykorzystać dobre pomysły. Połączmy się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_POSITIVE_02
The Assembly greets you, {STR_leaderName}. Let us break down the walls of ignorance and reconstruct a more logical ethical code together.
{STR_leaderName}, Zgromadzenie wita cię. Zburzmy mury ignorancji i stwórzmy wspólnie bardziej logiczny kod etyczny.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_01
The Assembly is ready to exchange diplomatic data streams. Requesting creation of an agenda of discussion.
Zgromadzenie jest gotowe do wymiany dyplomatycznych strumieni danych. Prosimy o utworzenie porządku dyskusji.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_02
Greetings again, flesh. What news do you have to share? Our information conduits are always receptive to logical and factual reports.
Witajcie ponownie, cieleśni. Jakie przynosicie wieści? Nasze kanały informacyjne są zawsze otwarte na logiczne i rzetelne informacje.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_PROPOSE_NEUTRAL_01
An exchange between our two factions would be an appropriate course of action. Let us commence negotiations.
Wymiana między naszymi frakcjami byłaby stosowną operacją. Przystąpmy do negocjacji.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_RECEIVED_01
Incoming trade request received. Determining feasibility…
Otrzymaliśmy propozycję handlową. Trwa badanie jej realności…

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_WAR_01
Eradication protocols engaged. {STR_reasons}. Your verminous faction will be exterminated. Make good use of your last days.
Aktywowano protokoły eksterminacji. {STR_reasons}. Twoja frakcja szkodników zostanie zlikwidowana. Cieszcie się dniami, które wam pozostały.

{STR_reasons} is a list of reasons, written like "You trespassed" and can be found in this excel sheet. This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_WAR_02
The goals of the Assembly require your elimination. {STR_reasons}. We have initiated an offensive sequence targeted at you. A countdown clock to your demise will be provided shortly.
Cele Zgromadzenia wymagają waszej likwidacji. {STR_reasons}. Rozpoczęliśmy ofensywę skierowaną przeciwko wam. Wkrótce udostępnimy zegar odliczający czas, jaki pozostał do waszej zagłady.

{STR_reasons} is a list of reasons, written like "You trespassed" and can be found in this excel sheet. This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_01
We would rather use scraps of flesh from a ruined promethium forge than your putrid meat.
Wolelibyśmy skrawki tkanek z zepsutej kuźni prometu niż wasze spleśniałe mięcho.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_02
I have read over one million years of records on ecological progress and I am distraught to discover that it has all resulted in you.
Przeczytaliśmy raporty z ponad miliona lat rozwoju ekologicznego i z rozczarowaniem odkrywamy, że wszystko to doprowadziło do powstania was.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_03
Perhaps if we throw you into our engineers’ spare parts pit you might actually graduate into something useful.
Być może gdybyśmy wrzucili was do dołu z częściami zamiennymi, powstałoby z was w końcu coś użytecznego.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_01
Admittedly, we covet your meat-shell. Your constituent parts seem exceptionally functional.
Trzeba przyznać, że zazdrościmy wam cielesnej powłoki. Wasze części składowe wyglądają na wyjątkowo funkcjonalne.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_02
We are pleased to know such a sophisticated entity such as yourself. You provide inspiration to our flesh-stitchers, who are currently attempting facsimiles of your form.
Cieszymy się z nawiązania znajomości z tak wyrafinowanymi istotami, jak wy. Stanowicie źródło natchnienia dla naszych cielesnych fastrygatorów, którzy próbują aktualnie naśladować waszą postać.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_03
Your efficiency is almost machine-like. Are you certain you have not previously been augmented by the Assembly? Truly impressive.
Wasza wydajność niemal dorównuje maszynom. Czy na pewno nie zostaliście wcześniej ulepszeni przez Zgromadzenie? To naprawdę imponujące.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_KINDLY_POSITIVE
Trade request accepted. Proceed to processing.
Umowa handlowa zaakceptowana. Przystępujemy do jej przetwarzania.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_DOUBTFUL
Trade with you is a necessary evil. Commence transaction immediately.
Handel z wami to zło konieczne. Natychmiast przedstawcie swoją propozycję.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_GENERIC_01
Trade request denied. Terminate process.
Żądanie handlu odrzucone. Koniec przetwarzania.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_GENERIC_02
We refuse to trade with you. Find a willing fool elsewhere.
Nie zgadzamy się na handel z wami. Znajdźcie sobie innych głupców.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Note that all the texts in this document that refer to two people - the speaker and the one spoken too - that can both be male or female.
Note that use of the 'localized' and 'alternative localized string' only applies for the gender of the speaker.
If the gender of the person spoken to requires inflection, please try to translate the text in a way that doesn't require such inflection. If this is impossible, please get in touch with us informing us of which lines this concerns and how they would be inflected in the language you are translating too.
